SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[AdditionalNotes], [b].[ClientId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[EndTime], [b].[ProducerId], [b].[Purpose], [b].[RequiresEngineer], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[StudioRoomId], [b].[TotalPrice], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization], [s].[Id], [s].[Capacity], [s].[EquipmentSummary], [s].[HasAnalogGear], [s].[HasVocalBooth], [s].[HourlyPrice], [s].[Location], [s].[Name]
FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [b].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [b].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN [StudioRooms] AS [s] ON [b].[StudioRoomId] = [s].[Id]
ORDER BY [b].[StartTime] DESC

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]

    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[AdditionalNotes], [b].[ClientId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[EndTime], [b].[ProducerId], [b].[Purpose], [b].[RequiresEngineer], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[StudioRoomId], [b].[TotalPrice], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization], [s].[Id], [s].[Capacity], [s].[EquipmentSummary], [s].[HasAnalogGear], [s].[HasVocalBooth], [s].[HourlyPrice], [s].[Location], [s].[Name]
FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [b].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [b].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN [StudioRooms] AS [s] ON [b].[StudioRoomId] = [s].[Id]
ORDER BY [b].[StartTime] DESC

SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[AdditionalNotes], [b].[ClientId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[EndTime], [b].[ProducerId], [b].[Purpose], [b].[RequiresEngineer], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[StudioRoomId], [b].[TotalPrice], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization], [s].[Id], [s].[Capacity], [s].[EquipmentSummary], [s].[HasAnalogGear], [s].[HasVocalBooth], [s].[HourlyPrice], [s].[Location], [s].[Name]
FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [b].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [b].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN [StudioRooms] AS [s] ON [b].[StudioRoomId] = [s].[Id]
ORDER BY [b].[StartTime] DESC

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[AdditionalNotes], [b].[ClientId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[EndTime], [b].[ProducerId], [b].[Purpose], [b].[RequiresEngineer], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[StudioRoomId], [b].[TotalPrice], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization], [s].[Id], [s].[Capacity], [s].[EquipmentSummary], [s].[HasAnalogGear], [s].[HasVocalBooth], [s].[HourlyPrice], [s].[Location], [s].[Name]
FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [b].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [b].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN [StudioRooms] AS [s] ON [b].[StudioRoomId] = [s].[Id]
ORDER BY [b].[StartTime] DESC

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Biography], [u].[HourlyRate], [u].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u].[Specialization]

    WHERE [u].[Role] = 1 AND [u].[Id] = @id
) AS [u0]
LEFT JOIN [Bookings] AS [b] ON [u0].[Id] = [b].[ProducerId]

SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Biography], [u0].[HourlyRate], [u0].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u0].[Specialization], [b].[Id], [b].[AdditionalNotes], [b].[ClientId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[EndTime], [b].[ProducerId], [b].[Purpose], [b].[RequiresEngineer], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[StudioRoomId], [b].[TotalPrice], [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Biography], [u].[HourlyRate], [u].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 1 AND [u].[Id] = @id
) AS [u0]
LEFT JOIN [Bookings] AS [b] ON [u0].[Id] = [b].[ProducerId]
LEFT JOIN [AudioProjects] AS [a] ON [u0].[Id] = [a].[ProducerId]
ORDER BY [u0].[Id], [b].[Id]

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

FROM (

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

        SELECT u0.Id, u0.CreatedAt, u0.Email, u0.Name, u0.PhoneNumber, u0.Role, u0.Surname, u0.Address, u0.BillingAddress, u0.CompanyName, u0.Country, u0.DateOfBirth, u0.IsPriorityClient, u0.Notes, u0.Password, b.Id, b.AdditionalNotes, b.ClientId, b.CreatedAt, b.EndTime, b.ProducerId, b.Purpose, b.RequiresEngineer, b.StartTime, b.Status, b.StudioRoomId, b.TotalPrice, a.Id, a.AllowClientComments, a.Budget, a.ClientId, a.CreatedAt, a.Deadline, a.Genre, a.ProducerId, a.SharedFolderUrl, a.Status, a.StudioRoomId, a.TargetDurationSeconds, a.Title, a.Type
        FROM 
        (
            SELECT TOP(1) u.Id, u.CreatedAt, u.Email, u.Name, u.PhoneNumber, u.Role, u.Surname, u.Address, u.BillingAddress, u.CompanyName, u.Country, u.DateOfBirth, u.IsPriorityClient, u.Notes, u.Password
            FROM Users AS u
            WHERE (u.Role == 0) && (u.Id == @id)
        ) AS u0
        LEFT JOIN Bookings AS b ON u0.Id == b.ClientId
        LEFT JOIN AudioProjects AS a ON u0.Id == a.ClientId
        ORDER BY u0.Id ASC, b.Id ASC) | Resolver: c => new RelationalCommandCache(

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

        SELECT s.Id, s.AllowClientComments, s.Budget, s.ClientId, s.CreatedAt, s.Deadline, s.Genre, s.ProducerId, s.SharedFolderUrl, s.Status, s.StudioRoomId, s.TargetDurationSeconds, s.Title, s.Type, s.Id0, s.CreatedAt0, s.Email, s.Name, s.PhoneNumber, s.Role, s.Surname, s.Address, s.BillingAddress, s.CompanyName, s.Country, s.DateOfBirth, s.IsPriorityClient, s.Notes, s.Password, s.Id1, s.CreatedAt1, s.Email0, s.Name0, s.PhoneNumber0, s.Role0, s.Surname0, s.Biography, s.HourlyRate, s.IsExternalCollaborator, s.Specialization, s0.Id, s0.CreatedAt, s0.Description, s0.DurationSeconds, s0.FileSize, s0.FileUrl, s0.IsApproved, s0.Name, s0.Notes, s0.ProjectId, s0.UpdatedAt, s0.VersionNumber, s0.Id0, s0.AuthorId, s0.Category, s0.CreatedAt0, s0.IsInternalNote, s0.IsResolved, s0.Message, s0.ProjectVersionId, s0.TimestampSeconds
        FROM 
        (
            SELECT TOP(1) a.Id, a.AllowClientComments, a.Budget, a.ClientId, a.CreatedAt, a.Deadline, a.Genre, a.ProducerId, a.SharedFolderUrl, a.Status, a.StudioRoomId, a.TargetDurationSeconds, a.Title, a.Type, u0.Id AS Id0, u0.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt0, u0.Email, u0.Name, u0.PhoneNumber, u0.Role, u0.Surname, u0.Address, u0.BillingAddress, u0.CompanyName, u0.Country, u0.DateOfBirth, u0.IsPriorityClient, u0.Notes, u0.Password, u2.Id AS Id1, u2.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt1, u2.Email AS Email0, u2.Name AS Name0, u2.PhoneNumber AS PhoneNumber0, u2.Role AS Role0, u2.Surname AS Surname0, u2.Biography, u2.HourlyRate, u2.IsExternalCollaborator, u2.Specialization
            FROM AudioProjects AS a
            INNER JOIN 
            (
                SELECT u.Id, u.CreatedAt, u.Email, u.Name, u.PhoneNumber, u.Role, u.Surname, u.Address, u.BillingAddress, u.CompanyName, u.Country, u.DateOfBirth, u.IsPriorityClient, u.Notes, u.Password
                FROM Users AS u
                WHERE u.Role == 0
            ) AS u0 ON a.ClientId == u0.Id
            INNER JOIN 
            (
                SELECT u1.Id, u1.CreatedAt, u1.Email, u1.Name, u1.PhoneNumber, u1.Role, u1.Surname, u1.Biography, u1.HourlyRate, u1.IsExternalCollaborator, u1.Specialization
                FROM Users AS u1
                WHERE u1.Role == 1
            ) AS u2 ON a.ProducerId == u2.Id
            WHERE a.Id == @id
        ) AS s
        LEFT JOIN 
        (
            SELECT p.Id, p.CreatedAt, p.Description, p.DurationSeconds, p.FileSize, p.FileUrl, p.IsApproved, p.Name, p.Notes, p.ProjectId, p.UpdatedAt, p.VersionNumber, t.Id AS Id0, t.AuthorId, t.Category, t.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt0, t.IsInternalNote, t.IsResolved, t.Message, t.ProjectVersionId, t.TimestampSeconds
            FROM ProjectVersions AS p
            LEFT JOIN TimecodedComments AS t ON p.Id == t.ProjectVersionId
        ) AS s0 ON s.Id == s0.ProjectId
        ORDER BY s.Id ASC, s.Id0 ASC, s.Id1 ASC, s0.Id ASC) | Resolver: c => new RelationalCommandCache(

        SELECT s.Id, s.AllowClientComments, s.Budget, s.ClientId, s.CreatedAt, s.Deadline, s.Genre, s.ProducerId, s.SharedFolderUrl, s.Status, s.StudioRoomId, s.TargetDurationSeconds, s.Title, s.Type, s.Id0, s.CreatedAt0, s.Email, s.Name, s.PhoneNumber, s.Role, s.Surname, s.Address, s.BillingAddress, s.CompanyName, s.Country, s.DateOfBirth, s.IsPriorityClient, s.Notes, s.Password, s.Id1, s.CreatedAt1, s.Email0, s.Name0, s.PhoneNumber0, s.Role0, s.Surname0, s.Biography, s.HourlyRate, s.IsExternalCollaborator, s.Specialization, s0.Id, s0.CreatedAt, s0.Description, s0.DurationSeconds, s0.FileSize, s0.FileUrl, s0.IsApproved, s0.Name, s0.Notes, s0.ProjectId, s0.UpdatedAt, s0.VersionNumber, s0.Id0, s0.AuthorId, s0.Category, s0.CreatedAt0, s0.IsInternalNote, s0.IsResolved, s0.Message, s0.ProjectVersionId, s0.TimestampSeconds
        FROM 
        (
            SELECT TOP(1) a.Id, a.AllowClientComments, a.Budget, a.ClientId, a.CreatedAt, a.Deadline, a.Genre, a.ProducerId, a.SharedFolderUrl, a.Status, a.StudioRoomId, a.TargetDurationSeconds, a.Title, a.Type, u0.Id AS Id0, u0.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt0, u0.Email, u0.Name, u0.PhoneNumber, u0.Role, u0.Surname, u0.Address, u0.BillingAddress, u0.CompanyName, u0.Country, u0.DateOfBirth, u0.IsPriorityClient, u0.Notes, u0.Password, u2.Id AS Id1, u2.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt1, u2.Email AS Email0, u2.Name AS Name0, u2.PhoneNumber AS PhoneNumber0, u2.Role AS Role0, u2.Surname AS Surname0, u2.Biography, u2.HourlyRate, u2.IsExternalCollaborator, u2.Specialization
            FROM AudioProjects AS a
            INNER JOIN 
            (
                SELECT u.Id, u.CreatedAt, u.Email, u.Name, u.PhoneNumber, u.Role, u.Surname, u.Address, u.BillingAddress, u.CompanyName, u.Country, u.DateOfBirth, u.IsPriorityClient, u.Notes, u.Password
                FROM Users AS u
                WHERE u.Role == 0
            ) AS u0 ON a.ClientId == u0.Id
            INNER JOIN 
            (
                SELECT u1.Id, u1.CreatedAt, u1.Email, u1.Name, u1.PhoneNumber, u1.Role, u1.Surname, u1.Biography, u1.HourlyRate, u1.IsExternalCollaborator, u1.Specialization
                FROM Users AS u1
                WHERE u1.Role == 1
            ) AS u2 ON a.ProducerId == u2.Id
            WHERE a.Id == @id
        ) AS s
        LEFT JOIN 
        (
            SELECT p.Id, p.CreatedAt, p.Description, p.DurationSeconds, p.FileSize, p.FileUrl, p.IsApproved, p.Name, p.Notes, p.ProjectId, p.UpdatedAt, p.VersionNumber, t.Id AS Id0, t.AuthorId, t.Category, t.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt0, t.IsInternalNote, t.IsResolved, t.Message, t.ProjectVersionId, t.TimestampSeconds
            FROM ProjectVersions AS p
            LEFT JOIN TimecodedComments AS t ON p.Id == t.ProjectVersionId
        ) AS s0 ON s.Id == s0.ProjectId
        ORDER BY s.Id ASC, s.Id0 ASC, s.Id1 ASC, s0.Id ASC, 
        False, 
        MultipleParameters
    )].GetRelationalCommandTemplate(parameters),

SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AllowClientComments], [s].[Budget], [s].[ClientId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[Deadline], [s].[Genre], [s].[ProducerId], [s].[SharedFolderUrl], [s].[Status], [s].[StudioRoomId], [s].[TargetDurationSeconds], [s].[Title], [s].[Type], [s].[Id0], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[Email], [s].[Name], [s].[PhoneNumber], [s].[Role], [s].[Surname], [s].[Address], [s].[BillingAddress], [s].[CompanyName], [s].[Country], [s].[DateOfBirth], [s].[IsPriorityClient], [s].[Notes], [s].[Password], [s].[Id1], [s].[CreatedAt1], [s].[Email0], [s].[Name0], [s].[PhoneNumber0], [s].[Role0], [s].[Surname0], [s].[Biography], [s].[HourlyRate], [s].[IsExternalCollaborator], [s].[Specialization], [s0].[Id], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[Description], [s0].[DurationSeconds], [s0].[FileSize], [s0].[FileUrl], [s0].[IsApproved], [s0].[Name], [s0].[Notes], [s0].[ProjectId], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[VersionNumber], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[AuthorId], [s0].[Category], [s0].[CreatedAt0], [s0].[IsInternalNote], [s0].[IsResolved], [s0].[Message], [s0].[ProjectVersionId], [s0].[TimestampSeconds]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[AdditionalNotes], [b].[ClientId], [b].[CreatedAt], [b].[EndTime], [b].[ProducerId], [b].[Purpose], [b].[RequiresEngineer], [b].[StartTime], [b].[Status], [b].[StudioRoomId], [b].[TotalPrice], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization], [s].[Id], [s].[Capacity], [s].[EquipmentSummary], [s].[HasAnalogGear], [s].[HasVocalBooth], [s].[HourlyPrice], [s].[Location], [s].[Name]
FROM [Bookings] AS [b]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [b].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [b].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN [StudioRooms] AS [s] ON [b].[StudioRoomId] = [s].[Id]
ORDER BY [b].[StartTime] DESC

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AllowClientComments], [s].[Budget], [s].[ClientId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[Deadline], [s].[Genre], [s].[ProducerId], [s].[SharedFolderUrl], [s].[Status], [s].[StudioRoomId], [s].[TargetDurationSeconds], [s].[Title], [s].[Type], [s].[Id0], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[Email], [s].[Name], [s].[PhoneNumber], [s].[Role], [s].[Surname], [s].[Address], [s].[BillingAddress], [s].[CompanyName], [s].[Country], [s].[DateOfBirth], [s].[IsPriorityClient], [s].[Notes], [s].[Password], [s].[Id1], [s].[CreatedAt1], [s].[Email0], [s].[Name0], [s].[PhoneNumber0], [s].[Role0], [s].[Surname0], [s].[Biography], [s].[HourlyRate], [s].[IsExternalCollaborator], [s].[Specialization], [s0].[Id], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[Description], [s0].[DurationSeconds], [s0].[FileSize], [s0].[FileUrl], [s0].[IsApproved], [s0].[Name], [s0].[Notes], [s0].[ProjectId], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[VersionNumber], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[AuthorId], [s0].[Category], [s0].[CreatedAt0], [s0].[IsInternalNote], [s0].[IsResolved], [s0].[Message], [s0].[ProjectVersionId], [s0].[TimestampSeconds]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]

    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AllowClientComments], [s].[Budget], [s].[ClientId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[Deadline], [s].[Genre], [s].[ProducerId], [s].[SharedFolderUrl], [s].[Status], [s].[StudioRoomId], [s].[TargetDurationSeconds], [s].[Title], [s].[Type], [s].[Id0], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[Email], [s].[Name], [s].[PhoneNumber], [s].[Role], [s].[Surname], [s].[Address], [s].[BillingAddress], [s].[CompanyName], [s].[Country], [s].[DateOfBirth], [s].[IsPriorityClient], [s].[Notes], [s].[Password], [s].[Id1], [s].[CreatedAt1], [s].[Email0], [s].[Name0], [s].[PhoneNumber0], [s].[Role0], [s].[Surname0], [s].[Biography], [s].[HourlyRate], [s].[IsExternalCollaborator], [s].[Specialization], [s0].[Id], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[Description], [s0].[DurationSeconds], [s0].[FileSize], [s0].[FileUrl], [s0].[IsApproved], [s0].[Name], [s0].[Notes], [s0].[ProjectId], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[VersionNumber], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[AuthorId], [s0].[Category], [s0].[CreatedAt0], [s0].[IsInternalNote], [s0].[IsResolved], [s0].[Message], [s0].[ProjectVersionId], [s0].[TimestampSeconds]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]

    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]

) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AllowClientComments], [s].[Budget], [s].[ClientId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[Deadline], [s].[Genre], [s].[ProducerId], [s].[SharedFolderUrl], [s].[Status], [s].[StudioRoomId], [s].[TargetDurationSeconds], [s].[Title], [s].[Type], [s].[Id0], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[Email], [s].[Name], [s].[PhoneNumber], [s].[Role], [s].[Surname], [s].[Address], [s].[BillingAddress], [s].[CompanyName], [s].[Country], [s].[DateOfBirth], [s].[IsPriorityClient], [s].[Notes], [s].[Password], [s].[Id1], [s].[CreatedAt1], [s].[Email0], [s].[Name0], [s].[PhoneNumber0], [s].[Role0], [s].[Surname0], [s].[Biography], [s].[HourlyRate], [s].[IsExternalCollaborator], [s].[Specialization], [s0].[Id], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[Description], [s0].[DurationSeconds], [s0].[FileSize], [s0].[FileUrl], [s0].[IsApproved], [s0].[Name], [s0].[Notes], [s0].[ProjectId], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[VersionNumber], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[AuthorId], [s0].[Category], [s0].[CreatedAt0], [s0].[IsInternalNote], [s0].[IsResolved], [s0].[Message], [s0].[ProjectVersionId], [s0].[TimestampSeconds]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (

) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]

ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

                WHERE u.Role == 0
            ) AS u0 ON a.ClientId == u0.Id
            INNER JOIN

                FROM Users AS u1
                WHERE u1.Role == 1
            ) AS u2 ON a.ProducerId == u2.Id
            WHERE a.Id == @id
        ) AS s
        LEFT JOIN 
        (
            SELECT p.Id, p.CreatedAt, p.Description, p.DurationSeconds, p.FileSize, p.FileUrl, p.IsApproved, p.Name, p.Notes, p.ProjectId, p.UpdatedAt, p.VersionNumber, t.Id AS Id0, t.AuthorId, t.Category, t.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt0, t.IsInternalNote, t.IsResolved, t.Message, t.ProjectVersionId, t.TimestampSeconds
            FROM ProjectVersions AS p

        ) AS s0 ON s.Id == s0.ProjectId

        SELECT s.Id, s.AllowClientComments, s.Budget, s.ClientId, s.CreatedAt, s.Deadline, s.Genre, s.ProducerId, s.SharedFolderUrl, s.Status, s.StudioRoomId, s.TargetDurationSeconds, s.Title, s.Type, s.Id0, s.CreatedAt0, s.Email, s.Name, s.PhoneNumber, s.Role, s.Surname, s.Address, s.BillingAddress, s.CompanyName, s.Country, s.DateOfBirth, s.IsPriorityClient, s.Notes, s.Password, s.Id1, s.CreatedAt1, s.Email0, s.Name0, s.PhoneNumber0, s.Role0, s.Surname0, s.Biography, s.HourlyRate, s.IsExternalCollaborator, s.Specialization, s0.Id, s0.CreatedAt, s0.Description, s0.DurationSeconds, s0.FileSize, s0.FileUrl, s0.IsApproved, s0.Name, s0.Notes, s0.ProjectId, s0.UpdatedAt, s0.VersionNumber, s0.Id0, s0.AuthorId, s0.Category, s0.CreatedAt0, s0.IsInternalNote, s0.IsResolved, s0.Message, s0.ProjectVersionId, s0.TimestampSeconds
        FROM 
        (
            SELECT TOP(1) a.Id, a.AllowClientComments, a.Budget, a.ClientId, a.CreatedAt, a.Deadline, a.Genre, a.ProducerId, a.SharedFolderUrl, a.Status, a.StudioRoomId, a.TargetDurationSeconds, a.Title, a.Type, u0.Id AS Id0, u0.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt0, u0.Email, u0.Name, u0.PhoneNumber, u0.Role, u0.Surname, u0.Address, u0.BillingAddress, u0.CompanyName, u0.Country, u0.DateOfBirth, u0.IsPriorityClient, u0.Notes, u0.Password, u2.Id AS Id1, u2.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt1, u2.Email AS Email0, u2.Name AS Name0, u2.PhoneNumber AS PhoneNumber0, u2.Role AS Role0, u2.Surname AS Surname0, u2.Biography, u2.HourlyRate, u2.IsExternalCollaborator, u2.Specialization
            FROM AudioProjects AS a
            INNER JOIN 
            (
                SELECT u.Id, u.CreatedAt, u.Email, u.Name, u.PhoneNumber, u.Role, u.Surname, u.Address, u.BillingAddress, u.CompanyName, u.Country, u.DateOfBirth, u.IsPriorityClient, u.Notes, u.Password
                FROM Users AS u
                WHERE u.Role == 0
            ) AS u0 ON a.ClientId == u0.Id
            INNER JOIN 
            (
                SELECT u1.Id, u1.CreatedAt, u1.Email, u1.Name, u1.PhoneNumber, u1.Role, u1.Surname, u1.Biography, u1.HourlyRate, u1.IsExternalCollaborator, u1.Specialization
                FROM Users AS u1
                WHERE u1.Role == 1
            ) AS u2 ON a.ProducerId == u2.Id
            WHERE a.Id == @id
        ) AS s
        LEFT JOIN 
        (
            SELECT p.Id, p.CreatedAt, p.Description, p.DurationSeconds, p.FileSize, p.FileUrl, p.IsApproved, p.Name, p.Notes, p.ProjectId, p.UpdatedAt, p.VersionNumber, t.Id AS Id0, t.AuthorId, t.Category, t.CreatedAt AS CreatedAt0, t.IsInternalNote, t.IsResolved, t.Message, t.ProjectVersionId, t.TimestampSeconds
            FROM ProjectVersions AS p
            LEFT JOIN TimecodedComments AS t ON p.Id == t.ProjectVersionId
        ) AS s0 ON s.Id == s0.ProjectId
        ORDER BY s.Id ASC, s.Id0 ASC, s.Id1 ASC, s0.Id ASC, 
        False, 
        MultipleParameters
    )].GetRelationalCommandTemplate(parameters),

SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[AllowClientComments], [s].[Budget], [s].[ClientId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[Deadline], [s].[Genre], [s].[ProducerId], [s].[SharedFolderUrl], [s].[Status], [s].[StudioRoomId], [s].[TargetDurationSeconds], [s].[Title], [s].[Type], [s].[Id0], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[Email], [s].[Name], [s].[PhoneNumber], [s].[Role], [s].[Surname], [s].[Address], [s].[BillingAddress], [s].[CompanyName], [s].[Country], [s].[DateOfBirth], [s].[IsPriorityClient], [s].[Notes], [s].[Password], [s].[Id1], [s].[CreatedAt1], [s].[Email0], [s].[Name0], [s].[PhoneNumber0], [s].[Role0], [s].[Surname0], [s].[Biography], [s].[HourlyRate], [s].[IsExternalCollaborator], [s].[Specialization], [s0].[Id], [s0].[CreatedAt], [s0].[Description], [s0].[DurationSeconds], [s0].[FileSize], [s0].[FileUrl], [s0].[IsApproved], [s0].[Name], [s0].[Notes], [s0].[ProjectId], [s0].[UpdatedAt], [s0].[VersionNumber], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[AuthorId], [s0].[Category], [s0].[CreatedAt0], [s0].[IsInternalNote], [s0].[IsResolved], [s0].[Message], [s0].[ProjectVersionId], [s0].[TimestampSeconds]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [AudioProjects] AS [a] ON [p].[ProjectId] = [a].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[Id] = @versionId_Value
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds], [u].[Id] AS [Id0], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password], [u].[Biography], [u].[HourlyRate], [u].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u].[Specialization]
    FROM [TimecodedComments] AS [t]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[AuthorId] = [u].[Id]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectVersionId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]

    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]

) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]

SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[Name], [u2].[PhoneNumber], [u2].[Role], [u2].[Surname], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
    WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [a].[Id], [a].[AllowClientComments], [a].[Budget], [a].[ClientId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Deadline], [a].[Genre], [a].[ProducerId], [a].[SharedFolderUrl], [a].[Status], [a].[StudioRoomId], [a].[TargetDurationSeconds], [a].[Title], [a].[Type], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[Name], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[Role], [u0].[Surname], [u0].[Address], [u0].[BillingAddress], [u0].[CompanyName], [u0].[Country], [u0].[DateOfBirth], [u0].[IsPriorityClient], [u0].[Notes], [u0].[Password], [u2].[Id] AS [Id1], [u2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u2].[Email] AS [Email0], [u2].[Name] AS [Name0], [u2].[PhoneNumber] AS [PhoneNumber0], [u2].[Role] AS [Role0], [u2].[Surname] AS [Surname0], [u2].[Biography], [u2].[HourlyRate], [u2].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u2].[Specialization]
    FROM [AudioProjects] AS [a]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[Role], [u].[Surname], [u].[Address], [u].[BillingAddress], [u].[CompanyName], [u].[Country], [u].[DateOfBirth], [u].[IsPriorityClient], [u].[Notes], [u].[Password]
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[Role] = 0
    ) AS [u0] ON [a].[ClientId] = [u0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[Name], [u1].[PhoneNumber], [u1].[Role], [u1].[Surname], [u1].[Biography], [u1].[HourlyRate], [u1].[IsExternalCollaborator], [u1].[Specialization]
        FROM [Users] AS [u1]
        WHERE [u1].[Role] = 1
    ) AS [u2] ON [a].[ProducerId] = [u2].[Id]
    WHERE [a].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[DurationSeconds], [p].[FileSize], [p].[FileUrl], [p].[IsApproved], [p].[Name], [p].[Notes], [p].[ProjectId], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[VersionNumber], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[AuthorId], [t].[Category], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[IsInternalNote], [t].[IsResolved], [t].[Message], [t].[ProjectVersionId], [t].[TimestampSeconds]
    FROM [ProjectVersions] AS [p]
    LEFT JOIN [TimecodedComments] AS [t] ON [p].[Id] = [t].[ProjectVersionId]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]
